title: Bash tool 的四类典型应用场景
title_en: Four Typical Use Cases for the Bash Tool

body.fact: Bash tool 有四类典型场景：(1) 开发工作流——运行构建命令、测试和开发工具（如 npm test、make build）；(2) 系统自动化——执行脚本、管理文件、自动化重复任务；(3) 数据处理——处理文件、运行分析脚本、管理数据集；(4) 环境配置——安装依赖包、配置开发环境。Shell 访问是 agent 的基础能力：在 Terminal-Bench 2.0（评估真实终端任务的 benchmark）上，Claude 使用持久 bash 会话时表现有显著提升。
body.context: Bash tool 是 server tool，由 Anthropic 在沙箱环境中执行。它是构建 coding agent 和系统自动化 agent 的核心工具之一，与 text editor tool、computer tool 共同组成 Claude 的内置工具集。

body_en.fact: The Bash tool covers four typical use cases: (1) Development workflows — run build commands, tests, and dev tools (e.g., npm test, make build); (2) System automation — execute scripts, manage files, automate repetitive tasks; (3) Data processing — process files, run analysis scripts, manage datasets; (4) Environment setup — install packages, configure environments. Shell access is a foundational agent capability: on Terminal-Bench 2.0 (a benchmark for real-world terminal tasks), Claude shows significant performance gains with a persistent bash session.
body_en.context: The Bash tool is a server tool, executed by Anthropic in a sandboxed environment. It's one of the core tools for building coding agents and system-automation agents, alongside the text editor tool and computer tool in Claude's built-in tool suite.
